explanations.3: declare(strict_types=1) makes PHP enforce that function arguments and return types must match exactly what you declared—no sneaky type conversions allowed.
explanations.9: VisitLoginPageTest extends TestWebCase, meaning it inherits test helper methods from a parent class (TestWebCase) that sets up common test functionality.
explanations.11: The @test annotation tells PHPUnit that this method is a test it should run, even though the method name starts with 'test_' which would trigger it anyway.
explanations.14: The false argument tells assertSee to search for the exact string literally, not as HTML-escaped text—so it looks for the raw id="password" in the response.
